description: Wait for a condition inside an open Locus View host window, then return elapsed timing. Use it after reloads, async data loads, or UI actions.

viewId.description: View id of the open View host window.

condition.description: Condition name: runtimeReady, selectorVisible, selectorHidden, textPresent, textAbsent, noConsoleError, or expression.

selector.description: CSS selector for selectorVisible or selectorHidden.

expression.description: JavaScript expression for condition expression. It receives root, detail, and args.

args.description: Optional JSON-compatible arguments passed to expression.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000 and is capped by the host.
